headline: Why Nasdaq (NDAQ) Is Up 9.0% After Record IPO Haul And Trump Accounts Spotlight
summary: In recent days, Nasdaq reported its strongest first half for U.S. listings in history, with US$129.30 billion raised from new offerings and seven of the year’s ten largest IPOs choosing its markets. At the same time, the upcoming launch of the “Trump Accounts” child investment program, with a US$1,000 Treasury-funded index contribution, has highlighted Nasdaq’s central role in promoting broad market participation and financial literacy. We’ll now examine how Nasdaq’s record listings momentum...
